chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 8094 of 2017 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.33857/2017 2. For hearing of main case 29.01.2025 Mr. Khalid Jawed Khan, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Ameer Bux Metlo, advocate for respondent Mr. Muhammad Aqeel Qureshi, advocate for respondent Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General Learned counsel for the petitioner states that Special Federal Excise Reference Application is pending in the subject matter which will determine the rights and liabilities of the respective parties. As requested, petition is dismissed as withdrawn, leaving the petitioner at liberty to move appropriate proceedings subject to the law. Judge Judge Amjad
